name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the flour, butter, and powdered sugar in a bowl until combined.
2. Press the mixture into an 8-inch square pan and refrigerate for 20 minutes before baking.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F (175°C), then spread the remaining ingredients evenly over the cooled cake layer.
5. Continue baking at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 25 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar immediately using a small strainer.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Recipe from The Three Rivers Cookbook (Vol.1)
From Sandy Gamble
